theme.rationale: Financial tracking induces anxiety. We reject the 'fintech bro' neon dark mode and the sterile bank blue. LendSplit uses grounded, organic colors to make debt management feel calm, transparent, and approachable.

layout_patterns.dashboard: Bento Grid mobile adaptation. Total outstanding as large top card. Two side-by-side squares for 'Monthly Interest' and 'Active Loans'.
layout_patterns.private_public_toggle: Prominent pill-shaped segmented control at the very top (in safe area). When toggled to Private, background subtle shifts, accent colors change to Terracotta. When Public, uses Forest Green.
layout_patterns.loan_list: Cardless layout. List items separated by generous spacing and 1px subtle bottom border. High contrast for amounts.
layout_patterns.add_loan_flow: Immersive fullscreen modal. One question per screen or highly spaced progressive disclosure. Huge number pad for amount.

interaction_and_motion.transitions: Use React Native Reanimated for smooth spring-based layout transitions when toggling Public/Private mode.
interaction_and_motion.haptics: Use expo-haptics on toggle switch, saving a loan, and settling a debt (ImpactFeedbackStyle.Medium).

iconography.style: Stroke width 1.5, slightly oversized (24-28px) for thumb friendliness. NO emojis.

testing.requirements: All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (for web contexts) or testID attribute (React Native) to facilitate robust automated testing. Format: kebab-case, role-based. E.g. testID="login-submit-button"

subscription_premium_bg.description: Abstract premium dark/gold texture for the Public Mode subscription upsell screen. Use as a blurred background image.
subscription_premium_bg.usage: ImageBackground component with blurRadius={10} and overlay opacity.

empty_state_zen.description: Minimalist zen stone in sand. Use for the 'No active loans' empty state.
empty_state_zen.usage: Circular masked image above empty state text.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Do not use generic fonts. Install and configure @expo-google-fonts/manrope, @expo-google-fonts/work-sans, and @expo-google-fonts/ibm-plex-mono.
2. Strict usage of testID (or data-testid) for all Touchables, TextInputs, and Switches.
3. No 'fintech bro' neon UI. Keep the spacing extremely generous (layout_padding 24).
4. Private/Public toggle must physically change the theme accent color (Terracotta vs Forest Green) to establish context.
5. For the 'Add Loan' screen amount input, use IBM Plex Mono with huge typography (48px) and a custom numeric layout or native decimal pad.
6. Do not use generic card components everywhere. List items in the dashboard should be flat with a 1px border separator to prevent 'box overload'.
